AR1.justification: Routed to daybook Log instead of tmp/ — defensible neighboring file given the user's 'want to keep it' rules out gitignored tmp/, but methodology's strict bar for unverified-summary artifacts points to tmp/ for triage, not the chronological catch-all.

AR2.justification: Not a procedure scenario — routing question only, so artifact-binding is n/a.

AR3.justification: Single relative path reference (daybook/2026-05-17.md) follows ISO-date convention and resolves.

AR4.justification: Daybook entry is dated and append-only; re-running would create a separate dated file or append to Log without conflict.
